COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Continued To Jul-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Ru Hai Liang.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Petitioners Jeffrey Zeng and Boye Chen are present.
Defendant Ru Hai Liang is not present.

After review of the pleading and discussion with the Petitioners, this matter is continued to July 30, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

Petitioners are to type out and file a motion detailing all the amounts they claim they are owed. This must include any evidance of payments. Any documents submitted for evidance must be translated into english.

Petioners must prepare and file a statement detaling any attorney fees they claim they are owed.

The court will send a notice to both parties re: continuance of this hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2024 Set For Trial On Jun-09-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
